name: Superior 160
description: Weekly hard puzzles from the Times (London newspaper) and similar publications.

name: No One Trick Ponies 250
description: Hard or higher level puzzles that each need more than one solving technique.

name: Almost Daily Nightmare 400
description: Less than Nightmare level, from Sudocue.net.

name: Learning Curve 2500
description: Puzzles that gradually get tougher. A day-one beginner should manage the first one.

name: Tarek's Pearly 6000
description: Extreme puzzles compiled by the author.

name: 17 Clue Puzzles
description: All 17-clue puzzles (49158) — the minimum number of clues for a proper sudoku.

name: Top 50K Toughest
description: Really tough, designed to test sudoku solvers, but solvable by talented humans.
